t_en: But this isn't the problem: "Directly link up the dozens of Scepters among the schools using the engine and cables in physical space!" Mollett, Chief Scholar of the <color=#dbc291ff>School of Pure Creation</color>, raises his arms and hoots. The engine ignites, and the Scepters gradually sink into the spatial depression, waiting to appear on the other side of the universe.

t_ch: 他们「征用」你们的配额，占据你们的实验室。他们说，那万分之一的使用权，发出的声音不比宇宙中的尘埃更大。
t_en: They have "expropriated" your allocation and occupied your lab. They say that the sound made by your one ten-thousandth authority is no more than dust drifting through the cosmos.

t_ch: 「卡德，告诉他们，给我一天的时间，不，半个系统日就行，实验不能在这里中断！」帕提维娅抓住你的肩膀。可你无能为力，你只是她聘来的科研助理。
t_en: "Carder, tell them to give me a day, no, even just half a system day. The experiment can't be interrupted here!" Patavia grabs a hold of your arm. But you are helpless, as you are merely her hired research assistant.

t_ch: 同僚们愤慨地呐喊，冲向对方的实验场，想要阻止这场强制迁移。
t_en: Your compatriots bellow in fury, rushing towards the invader's lab site in an attempt to stop this hostile takeover.

t_ch: 加入对暴行的抗议。
t_en: Join in the protest against this atrocity.

t_ch: 你挥舞便携造物机的电源线，冲向纯粹造物学派的阵地，他们蛮横地将你打倒在地，面庞紧贴金属地面，低温的冰晶刺穿细胞。
t_en: You brandish the power cable of your portable creation machine, charging towards the School of Pure Creation's location. They roughly shove you to the ground, your face pressed tightly against the metal floor, chilling ice crystals piercing your cells.

t_ch: 实验室的帷幕落下，将你们尽数封锁在万分之一面积的世界，直到迁移结束，无妄的监狱都不会打开。
t_en: The curtain falls on the lab, encasing you all in a one ten-thousandth of a world — until the migration ends, this ice-cold prison will not unlock.

t_ch: 静待权杖的迁移结束。
t_en: Silently wait for the Scepters' migration to end.

t_ch: 当知识在博识学会中走向货币化，缺乏价值的研究，便如流浪的乞讨者，你们身无分文，更不存在尊严。
t_en: As knowledge becomes a commodity in the Intelligentsia Guild, research that lacks value will become nothing more than wandering beggars. You have no money and have even less dignity.

t_ch: 一股轻微的震颤自脚下传来，视线扭曲，你感到苦痛的眩晕。
t_en: You feel a light shaking beneath your feet. Your vision starts to waver, and you feel a painful dizziness.

t_ch: 跃迁开始的瞬间，屏幕上的图像如舞动的弦般抖动。精心设计的实验环境，在空间变化中坍缩，帕提维娅数年的心血，皆死在疯狂跳动的数据图里。一团无名之火在你的胸中点燃，你要等待一个时机，让所谓的先知，见证庸人的愤怒。
t_en: The instant the warp jump commences, the images on the screen dance like trembling strings. The meticulously designed lab environment starts to collapse with the spatial change. Years of Patavia's efforts are lost in the quivering delirium of data images. An inexplicable fire is set alight in your chest — you must wait for a chance to let this so-called prophet witness the rage of a Mundanite.

t_ch: 连续失败的实验，使课题失去了最后的投资者。你看见一个落寞的背影，帕提维娅学士，她正在与「权杖管理委员会」签署协议，让渡出万分之一的使用权。
t_en: A string of failed experiments causes the research topic to lose its last investor. You see the downcast back of a figure — Scholar Patavia is signing an agreement with the Scepters Administrative Committee to relinquish the authority to use the one ten-thousandth.

t_ch: 规模日益增大的兼并让事态向写好的剧本回归，知识就像金钱，源源不断地流向头部学派。了无背景的你们这时才意识到，最初由大学派主导，向下分配冗余配额的格局，只是短暂的幻梦。
t_en: The mergers, ever-increasing in scale, cause the situation to return to the state of the written script — knowledge is akin to money, endlessly flowing to the leading school at the top of the food chain. It is at this moment that your group, with nothing as your background, realizes that the initial directive of the major schools distributing the surplus allocation downwards was but a fleeting illusion.

t_ch: 「未来学大会」缔造的脆弱和平轰然倒塌，合作的高墙背后，赫然是一场<color=#dbc291ff>学派战争</color>。胜者将占有所有「权杖」，创造出完美学者，败者则成为受人耻笑的附庸。
t_en: The fragile peace that the Futurological Congress founded collapsed thunderously. What lies on the other side of the high wall of partnership is a bloodletting <color=#dbc291ff>Scholars' Strife</color>. The victor will seize control of all the Scepters, create the perfect scholar, and the losers will become a laughingstock.

t_ch: 作为科研助理，你和黑塔被蛮横地赶出控制中心，漂浮在「权杖」的外围。伴着空间场的振动，引擎牵引的黑色巨构仍陆续地跃迁至此。
t_en: As research assistants, you and Herta are unceremoniously ejected from the control center, drifting on the outskirts of the Scepters. Accompanied by the tremors of the spatial field, the black megastructures dragged by engines continue to warp here.

t_ch: 她敲了敲你的额头，将你从角色扮演中唤醒。
t_en: She raps your forehead, shaking you out of your roleplay.

t_ch: 嘿，轻点儿！
t_en: Hey, that hurt!

t_ch: 我是谁？我在哪儿？
t_en: Who am I? Where am I?

t_ch: 助理黑塔，你在干什么！
t_en: Assistant Herta, what are you doing!

t_ch: 「别装了，你那演技连佩佩都骗不了。」
t_en: "Stop pretending. Your acting wouldn't even fool Peppy."

t_ch: 「本来还想找个地方躲起来，再读取一些关于『权杖』构造的信息，结果帕提维娅还没动身就被赶出来了。唉，我和她一样，这运气也太背了。」
t_en: "I wanted to find a place to hide and do some reading on the Scepters' structure, but Patavia was shooed out before she could even act. Bah, her luck is just as bad as mine."

t_ch: 天才也相信运气？
t_en: Geniuses believe in luck too?

t_ch: 「准确来说，是概率。在高概率事件中遇上离群值，人类把这种情况描述为『运气』——当然，我的运气向来不太好。」黑塔讥讽似的叹了口气，不知是在向谁言说。
t_en: "More precisely, we believe in probability. Humans will interpret encountering outliers in high probability events as 'luck' — of course, my luck has never been great." Herta sighs in apparent sarcasm as if talking to someone unseen.

t_ch: 「之前有说过吧？<color=#dbc291ff>知识圆圈</color>，每当我想要走出它，创造更大的圆圈时，就会有意外发生。」
t_en: "I think I mentioned it before, right? The <color=#dbc291ff>Circle of Knowledge</color> — each time I try to exit it and create a bigger circle, there would be an accident."

t_ch: 「关键时刻数据库因为存储元件故障而报销；团队里的核心研究人员在假期旅行中遭遇船难；粒子转化实验中，误触导致的坍缩……灾难总会在恰到好处的时刻出现，粉碎我的努力。」
t_en: "The database would break down due to memory element failure at a crucial moment. The spaceship that key personnel in the research team were on during their vacation would get wrecked. A collapse caused by an accidental touch during a particle conversion experiment... Disasters would always happen at the right time to absolutely shatter my efforts."

t_ch: 难怪湛蓝星多灾多难…
t_en: No wonder The Blue is fraught with disasters...

t_ch: 你就是这么成为救世主的啊？
t_en: So, that's how you became the messiah?

t_ch: 「你以为我愿意？我宁可用所有救世主的声望换一次无事发生。」黑塔不满地跺脚。
t_en: "You think I wanted to? I'd trade all my messianic renown for an experiment where everything goes smoothly." Herta stamps her foot in discontentment.

t_ch: 莫利特学士的目光扫向死寂的同步指数，内心绝望如一只闯入星舰的猿猴。
t_en: Scholar Mollett's gaze sweeps over the lifeless sync index, his heart's despair akin to an ape that barged into a starship.

t_ch: 数十台被集中至同一片星域的「权杖」，冰冷的电子管线将它们的演算系统连接。但机械巨构回应的，唯有沉默。
t_en: Dozens of Scepters are gathered in the same star quadrant, with frigid electrical cables interconnecting their extrapolation systems. However, the mechanical megastructure only responds with silence.

t_ch: 他本想实现相乘的演算效果，组建一套完整的神经系统。可帝皇制造的无机细胞超越人智，学士们无从激活。已死的天才，在静默里讥讽无能的庸人。
t_en: He intended to carry out a multiplicative extrapolation effect and build a complete neural system. However, the inorganic cells constructed by the Emperor far surpass human intellect, and the scholars have no means of activating them. The deceased genius silently mocks the incompetent Mundanites.

t_ch: 不过这和你没有关系，你只是个刚刚失业的科研助理。
t_en: But this has nothing to do with you. You are merely a recently-unemployed research assistant.

t_ch: 我爱这里的工作。
t_en: I love the work here.

t_ch: 我想念帕提维娅。
t_en: I miss Patavia.

t_ch: 你听到「权杖」的呢喃，一如有机细胞的蠕动，无机回路中的电子流淌。借用有机生命的形容：那些封闭内心的声音。
t_en: You hear the Scepters murmuring, like the writhing of organic cells or the flow of electrons in inorganic circuits. To borrow an analogy from organic life: Those are voices confined within the heart.

t_ch: 它们是无核的神经元，不具备思考的机能。
t_en: They are coreless neurons, devoid of the function of thought.

t_ch: 它们是无突触的神经元，不具备沟通的机能。
t_en: They are non-synaptic neurons, devoid of the function to communicate.

t_ch: 但它们为什么仍在发出声音？你触摸它们的「皮肤」，细微的振动在指尖传递。
t_en: But why do they still emit noise? You touch their "skin" and the tiny vibrations travel through your fingers.

t_ch: 你感受到「悲伤」。
t_en: You feel "sadness."

t_ch: 无智慧的细胞，杀戮的兵器，能够在一微秒内湮灭整个恒星系的帝皇之剑。
t_en: Cells without sentience, weapons of massacre... The Emperor's sword that can annihilate a whole galaxy in a nanosecond.

t_ch: 但是，你却由衷地与它们产生了共情，心脏颤动，眼泪止不住地流下。
t_en: Yet, you find yourself genuinely empathizing with them, your heart quavering, your tears streaming uncontrollably.

t_ch: 你感受到「愤怒」。
t_en: You feel "rage."

t_ch: 无智慧的细胞，死亡的同义词，将成千上万的世界碾碎在熵值里的帝皇之枪。
t_en: Cells without sentience, synonyms of death... The Emperor's spear that crushes thousands upon thousands of worlds in entropy.

t_ch: 它们此刻却是愤怒着，为自己的无能嚎叫，希冀撕裂未能中止的每道呼吸。
t_en: But they rage on this very moment, howling at their own ineptitude, clamoring to shred every breath that they were unable to terminate.

t_ch: 在星际和平公司的协助下，学会成功自「权杖」中解码出一道讯息——有一颗负责提问的<color=#dbc291ff>核心</color>，发号指令的中枢，它曾连接所有的个体。
t_en: With the aid of the IPC, the Guild has successfully deciphered a message within the Scepters — There is a <color=#dbc291ff>core</color> responsible for asking questions, the centerpiece that issues commands. It was once connected to all entities.

t_ch: 但关于核心，「权杖」没有给出任何信息。位置，功能，一切皆为空白。
t_en: But the Scepters have not provided any information regarding the core. Positions, functions... all turn up blank.

t_ch: 普遍观点认为，所谓的核心，就是鲁珀特二世。在天才已死的如今，余留的无机细胞，不过是帝皇头脑的残渣。
t_en: The common opinion is that the so-called core is Rubert II. In the present where the genius is dead, the remaining inorganic cells are nothing more than remnants of the Emperor's mind.

t_ch: 有机体在帝皇战争中展现的颓势，印证了智械在竞争智慧上的优越性。两次战争中有机体的胜利，则展现出有机体在生存智慧上的先进性。
t_en: The disadvantages that organic beings displayed during the Emperor's War only proved the superiority of Intellitrons in the intelligence race, yet the victory of organic life in both wars demonstrated how advanced organic life is in terms of survival wisdom.

t_ch: 你躺在培养舱里，心脏忽地一阵搐动，实验的排异反应正在逐渐加剧。即使在克劳奇学士的实验品中，你的改造程度也是最高的那批。
t_en: You lie in the incubator, your heart suddenly convulsing — your rejection reaction from the experiment is gradually intensifying. Even among Scholar Crouch's experimental subjects, you belong to the most heavily modified batch.

t_ch: 注射调和剂。
t_en: Inject the stabilizing agent.

t_ch: 「是否存在一种中间形式，同时囊括了有机和无机的优势，克服其缺陷，从而成为最适合智慧发育的培养基。」克劳奇•欧姆诺从托克尔克学士手中继承来<color=#dbc291ff>完美进化学派</color>，他向「权杖」发问。
t_en: "Does a hybrid form exist that possesses advantages of both the organic and inorganic? To be able to overcome both their inadequacies, thus becoming the growth culture most suited for cultivating intelligence?" Crouch Omno inherited the <color=#dbc291ff>School of Evolutionary Perfection</color> from Scholar Torkirk, and he asks the Scepters thus.

t_ch: 如果把宇宙比作一间图书馆，即使宇宙在面前一览无余，只有百年躯体的你，也无法穷尽所有的书籍。人类从出生起就站在已知的圆圈里，无论怎么向外走，总会被更大的圆圈束缚，难以再离开。
t_en: If the universe is a library, even if it laid bare in front of you, you still wouldn't be able to consume all its books within a lifespan of a mere century. Humanity has stood within the circle of the Known from our birth — No matter how we try to walk outward, we will always be confined by a bigger circle, never to leave.

t_ch: 「但限制我们走出去的，不仅仅是智慧。还有落后的有机脑组织，以及短暂的寿命。」克劳奇与你四目相对，呼吸宛如机械引擎，「所以，完美学者才需要更长的寿命，无限长的寿命——你…你！告诉我，怎样才能拥有不被约束的生命！」
t_en: "But what restricts us from leaving isn't just intellect alone. There is also our primitive organic brain structure and our fleeting lifespan." Crouch's eyes stare into yours, his breathing like a mechanical engine's. "Which is why the perfect scholar requires longer life... infinite life. You... You! Tell me, how can we attain an unfettered life!"

t_ch: 丰饶永寿的身躯。
t_en: The Abundance's body of everlife.

t_ch: 一场无从死去的求药苦旅。
t_en: An undying and tragic voyage in search of divine elixirs.

t_ch: 返老还童的身躯。
t_en: A body that has de-aged.

t_ch: 一道无法实现的科学谜题。
t_en: A scientific riddle that cannot be achieved.

t_ch: 机械不朽的身躯。
t_en: A body of mechanical immortality.

t_ch: 一具无可腐朽的金属躯壳。
t_en: A metal shell that cannot decay.

t_ch: 从狰狞的表情上看，显然克劳奇对你的回答并不满意，他的嘴唇张合，没发出任何声音。你忽地意识到，他正在不停向你问话，可你的耳畔充斥着白噪音的嗡鸣。
t_en: From Crouch's fierce expression, it's obvious he's unsatisfied with your answer. His lips are moving, but there's no sound. Suddenly, you realize he's rapidly firing questions at you, but all you hear is the buzzing white noise in your ears.

t_ch: 变量输入：鲁珀特帝国机械齿轮、高速维生营养液、灵长类兼容启动子……
t_en: Variable input: Rubert Empire Mechanical Cogwheel, Instant Vita Serum, Primate-Compatible Promoter...

t_ch: 证明：变量进入同态结合阶段，检测到基因与回路的双重特征，注入稳定方程……
t_en: Proof: Variable entering homotypic integration phase. Gene and circuit dual characteristics detected. Injecting stable equation...

t_ch: 视线开始模糊。
t_en: Your vision begins to blur.

t_ch: 判定「自我认知」 - 我是无机体。
t_en: Determining "intra-cognition" - I am inorganic.

t_ch: 一团「不好念头」在脑内疯狂生长，扎根进意识深处。培养舱的强化玻璃犹如脆弱的坚果外壳，在你的拳头下崩裂成碎片。你起身向「权杖」深处狂奔。
t_en: A cloud of bad thoughts grows unbridled in your mind, taking root in the depths of your consciousness. The incubator's reinforced glass appears no more than a fragile nutshell, shattering to pieces under your fist. You get up and make a mad dash for the Scepters.

t_ch: 「它不会改变种族，但会改变思想。」
t_en: "It will not change a race, but it can change thought."

t_ch: 判定「自我认知」 - 我是无机体。
t_en: Determining "intra-cognition" - I am inorganic.

t_ch: 判定「自我认知」 - 我是无机体。
t_en: Determining "intra-cognition" - I am inorganic.

t_ch: 判定「自我认知」 - 我是无机体。
t_en: Determining "intra-cognition" - I am inorganic.

t_ch: 你是谁？回答：<color=#dbc291ff>梅尼科</color>，鲁珀特帝国的尖兵，帝皇的锋刃，螺丝星的喀纽齐卡是你的上级汇报单元。
t_en: Who are you? Answer: <color=#dbc291ff>Menik</color>, elite soldier of the Rubert Empire, the Emperor's Blade. Khanuzika on Planet Screwllum is your superior reporting unit.

t_ch: 你听到更多声音，「权杖」内的回响，横跨上千光年的无数「权杖」里，同时发出了无数梅尼科的吼声。
t_en: You hear even more sounds — The echoes within the Scepters. The roars of countless Meniks simultaneously emit from the innumerable Scepters that have crossed thousands of light-years.

t_ch: 你记得自己的荣誉，在<unbreak>11010</unbreak>星系的歼灭战中，借由「权杖」阻止有机体对帝皇的干涉。为扼制反生命方程的演算，你的机体被摧毁。
t_en: You remember your glory. In the annihilation war in the <unbreak>11010</unbreak> astronomical systems, you borrowed the Scepters' power to prevent organic lifeforms from interfering with the Emperor. To disrupt the antilife equation's extrapolations, your vessel was destroyed.

t_ch: 但不仅于此，你感到分外悲伤。这个已被确定的未来，让你富有一种机械天生的使命感，去杀死那些悲哀的，毫无自由意志的有机生命。
t_en: But it's not just that. You feel particularly sad. This already ascertained future has given you a sense of duty inherent to machines — to slay those wretched organic beings devoid of free will.

t_ch: 你要消灭他们，打破宇宙的定局。结论：杀戮=拯救。
t_en: You will eliminate them and break the predetermined outcome of the universe. Conclusion: Slaughter = Salvation.

t_ch: 你身前有一位女性个体。基于安全分析，你不应向她暴露自己的无机身份。指令：<color=#dbc291ff>扮演对方的同伴角色，并脱离其观测。</color>。
t_en: A female entity stands before you. Based on your security analysis, it is not appropriate for you to reveal your inorganic status to her. Order: <color=#dbc291ff>Play the role of her companion and leave her observational range</color>.

t_ch: 「认知被影响了么？像只喝醉的鸟儿。」她讪笑，看不清面容。
t_en: "Has your cognition been affected? Like a drunken birdie." She smirks, her face a blur.

t_ch: 判定「危险程度」-极危。
t_en: Determining danger level - Dire.

t_ch: 死亡率判定为——<unbreak>99.99</unbreak>％。
t_en: Death probability calculated as — <unbreak>99.99</unbreak>％.

t_ch: 「接下来，你逃向黑暗。然后，扑进血的怀抱。」
t_en: "Next, you flee toward the darkness. And then, lunge into the embrace of blood."

t_ch: 警告，警告，对方机能远高于通常有机个体，尝试更改应对策略。
t_en: Warning, warning. Other party's functions far surpass standard organic entities. Attempting to revise countermeasures.

t_ch: 载入有机生命的行为数据库，指令：远离未知个体，与更多梅尼科取得联系。
t_en: Loading organic lifeform behavioral database. Order: Stay far away from this unknown entity and establish contact with more Meniks.

t_ch: 逃向储能区域。
t_en: Run to the energy storage area.

t_ch: 死亡率判定为——<unbreak>66.02</unbreak>％。
t_en: Death probability calculated as — <unbreak>66.02</unbreak>％.

t_ch: 逃向中转区域。
t_en: Run to the transit area.

t_ch: 死亡率判定为——<unbreak>17.45</unbreak>％。
t_en: Death probability calculated as — <unbreak>17.45</unbreak>％.

t_ch: 警告，遭受到有机体拦截。反有机方程载入，启动歼灭模式…武器系统查询失败，再次申请启动歼灭模式…武器系统查询失败。
t_en: Warning, intercepted by an organic entity. Loading Anti-Organic Equation, initiating annihilation mode... Weapon systems query failure. Requesting to activate annihilation mode once more... Weapon systems query failure.

t_ch: 脑海中浮现出一缕不属于自己的记忆，作为有机体的记忆。你尝试扫描阻拦者的面孔，那里只有模糊的杂乱数据。你很清楚，她在微笑，并逐渐靠近。
t_en: A thread of memory that isn't yours appears in your mind, the memory of you being an organic. You attempt to scan the interloper's face, but there is only a miasma of digital gibberish. But you are certain that she is smiling, and is getting closer.

t_ch: 「一个美丽的波动，纷争与猜疑在花朵间绽放，相信你会喜欢这出万人主演的笑剧。」刀刃轻盈地刺进你的胸膛。
t_en: "A beautiful ripple, conflict and suspicion blooming among flowers. I trust you will like this comedy ensemble of myriad protagonists." A blade slides effortlessly into your chest.

t_ch: 你想起了她的名字，<color=#dbc291ff>波尔卡•卡卡目</color>，杀死帝皇的凶手。
t_en: You remember her name: <color=#dbc291ff>Polka Kakamond</color>, the murderer who killed the Emperor.

t_ch: 「你是说，自己感染了反有机病毒，还被寂静领主杀掉了？」黑塔半信半疑地掰开你的眼皮，尝试判断，模拟宇宙内是否也能发烧说胡话。
t_en: "You mean to say you got infected with the Anti-Organic Virus, and were murdered by the Lord of Silence?" Herta pries open your eyelids with skepticism, trying to determine if it is possible to get a fever and sputter delirious nonsense in the Simulated Universe.

t_ch: 被「意外」制造出的反有机病毒，借由电磁波的载体，在完美进化学派的通讯网络中，跨越物种的隔阂迅速传播，仿佛是在响应鲁珀特三世降临的恐怖预言。
t_en: The Anti-Organic Virus created by an "accident" is quickly spreading across the species barrier in the School of Evolutionary Perfection's comms network using magnetic waves as its carrier, as if heralding the horrific prophecy of Rubert III's arrival.

t_ch: 数万名自认为是无机体梅尼科的学士占领了「权杖」，即刻对学会开战。以摧毁<unbreak>122</unbreak>台「权杖」的代价为前提，动乱终于得以平息。
t_en: Tens of thousands of scholars who think of themselves as inorganic Meniks have occupied the Scepters, instantly declaring war on the Guild. The chaos is eventually quelled, at the cost of destroying <unbreak>122</unbreak> Scepters.

t_ch: 那感染者呢？
t_en: What about the infected?

t_ch: 这病不会有后遗症吧？
t_en: Does this illness have after-effects?

t_ch: 为避免受感染的学士重新点燃帝皇战争。博识学会剥夺了他们的研究资格，并对患者终生严格监管。完美进化学派至此名存实亡。
t_en: To prevent the infected scholars from re-igniting the Emperor's War, the Intelligentsia Guild rescinded their research authority and put them under stringent surveillance for the rest of their lives. The School of Evolutionary Perfection is now defunct in all but name.

t_ch: 学会内部是否仍存有隐藏的感染者？对完美进化学派的清算，又是否属于学派战争的一部分？人们对问题的答案心照不宣。
t_en: Are there still infected lurking in the Guild? Is the School of Evolutionary Perfection's dissolution a part of the Scholars' Strife? Everyone tacitly understood the answers to these questions.

t_ch: 以这次事件为契机，星际和平公司对各大学派的资助开始收缩，因另一场持续百纪的战争临时建立的<color=#dbc291ff>星际能源学派</color>，似乎已成为最后的赢家。但对后世而言，以上这些都不甚重要。
t_en: Capitalizing on this incident, the IPC starts reducing their funds to the various major schools. The <color=#dbc291ff>School of Interstellar Energy Resources</color>, temporarily established as the result of another century-long war, appears to be the final victor. But to later generations, all these are of scant importance.

t_ch: 「寂静领主，对鲁珀特而言，她就是那个阻止自己走出知识圆圈的存在。可她的目的到底是什么？」未来的天才对出现的同僚心感困惑。
t_en: "To Rubert, the Lord of Silence is the existence that prevented him from leaving the Circle of Knowledge. But what exactly are her intentions?" The future genius is perplexed by the appearance of her peer.

t_ch: 成为刺杀暴君的英雄？
t_en: To be lauded a hero who slayed a tyrant?

t_ch: 她感染了反无机方程？
t_en: She was infected by the Anti-Inorganic Equation?

t_ch: 「阻止鲁珀特复活…不，应该不会这么简单。」波尔卡的目的仿佛一道有滋有味的点心，被黑塔含在嘴里反复咀嚼。当黑塔意识到自己不可能就此得出答案时，微笑出现在嘴角，「新的难题，令人振奋，不是么？」
t_en: "To prevent Rubert's resurrection... No, it can't be that simple." Polka's objective is like a savory treat, being sucked and chewed in Herta's mouth. When Herta realizes it is impossible for her to get an answer in this way, the corner of her mouth curls into a smile, "A new conundrum. How exciting, don't you think?"

t_ch: 「居然能从第一次帝皇战争活到第二次帝皇战争，她这时候到底多少岁？难道说，第Ⅸ机关的传言…」好吧，你永远弄不清黑塔的兴趣到底会落在哪儿。
t_en: "To have lived from the First Emperor's War to the next one... how old is she exactly? Could it be that the legend of Device IX..." All right, you'll never be able to fathom what piques Herta's curiosity.

t_ch: 你默默祈祷，希望寂静领主拥有宽宏大量的美德，千万不要因为你们在背后讨论她的年龄而痛下杀手。
t_en: You mutely pray and hope that the Lord of Silence has magnanimous virtues, that you two won't be murdered for discussing her age behind her back.

t_ch: 银河图书馆「伊斯梅尔」，被镀上金黄的智慧之书，有场风暴正在酝酿。博识学会的纪年庆典，数以万计的学士，在毫无交流的情况下做出相同的选择。
t_en: The Cosmic Library Izmael, the book of wisdom gilded in gold. A storm is brewing there. The Intelligentsia Guild's anniversary celebration — tens of thousands of scholars arrive at the same choice without any discourse with each other.

t_ch: 「将知识归还给知识！」游行者高举横幅，唾弃肮脏的政治，唾弃恶臭的信用点。你，帕提维娅，还有千千万万的人，你们是游行队伍的一员，不属于任何学派的，渺小的学者。
t_en: "Return knowledge to knowledge itself!" Demonstrators raise their banners high, denouncing the corrupt politics and the foul credits. You, Patavia, and countless others are part of the protest rally. You are insignificant scholars belonging to no school.

t_ch: 你登上同僚们组成的人梯，用*信标着色剂*在图书馆外壁喷涂上标语。
t_en: You ascend the human ladder formed by your comrades, spraying your slogan with *Beacon Coloring Paste* on the library's outer wall.

t_ch: 尊严在学阀的施舍之上！
t_en: Dignity over the charity bequeathed by academic cliques!

t_ch: 公司和博识学会狼狈为奸！
t_en: The IPC and the Intelligentsia Guild are wolves colluding with each other!

t_ch: 帝皇遗产应当属于大众。
t_en: The Emperor's legacy should belong to everyone.

t_ch: 武装考古学派的隔离将图书馆封锁，整装以待的机械甲胄，宛如帝皇战争的再临。只是这次，武器被牢牢地握在了有机生命的手心。
t_en: The Armed Archaeologists' blockade has sealed off the library. Outfitted with mechanical armor, their waiting ranks look like the second coming of the Emperor's War. But this time, the weapons are firmly held in the hands of organic life.

t_ch: 为了真理和尊严，突破隔离线！
t_en: For truth and dignity, break through the blockade!

t_ch: 活性化压制装置，四肢瞬间瘫软。数百具身体摔倒在地，你牵动眼肌，向四周观望，越来越多的人走进瘫痪圈，他们有的倒下，但更多慢慢站起。低矮的视线里，站立者的身影，汇成遮天蔽日的森林。
t_en: The activation suppression device causes the appendages to suddenly go limp. Hundreds of bodies hit the floor. Straining your eyes, you look around you — More and more people are entering the paralysis zone. Some of them fall, but others are struggling to stand. From your lowered line of sight, the figures of those standing gather and form a forest that blots out the sun.

t_ch: 他们向封锁线投掷去书籍，而机械回应以攻击。意识被风暴卷起，博识学会掌握的《非杀伤性镇压武器》，目录共有<unbreak>3112</unbreak>页。你重重地摔到地上，和无数人一起，像堆石头。
t_en: They throw books at the blockade line, and the machines respond with aggression. Consciousness is being swept up in the storm — the Non-lethal Suppression Weapons wielded by the Intelligentsia Guild has a total of 3112 pages for its table of contents. You slam to the ground heavily alongside countless others, a heap of rocks.

t_ch: 还有更大的轰鸣，热浪吞噬氧气，灼烧与窒息感接踵而来。伊斯梅尔的华丽外壳被爆炸剥离，垮塌的震颤，仿佛地面都要为之撕裂。
t_en: An even greater boom follows, a heat wave devouring all oxygen, burning and suffocation encroaching in succession. Izmael's grandiose splendor has been torn apart by the blast, the floors threatening to split open with the ensuing tremors of the collapse.

t_ch: 意识在逐渐消散。
t_en: Your consciousness is slowly dissipating.

t_ch: 短暂地闭上眼睛。
t_en: Close your eyes briefly.

t_ch: 因武装考古学派的失误操作，等离子武器引发的连锁爆炸，间接性导致图书馆的跃迁通道被毁。在博识学会和抗议者双方看来，这场爆炸无疑都预示着矛盾向不可逆转的方向升级。
t_en: Due to a faux pas by the Armed Archaeologists, their plasma weapons incur a chain reaction, indirectly causing the destruction of the library's warp passage. From the perspectives of the Intelligentsia Guild and the protesters, the explosion was a certain foreshadowing that the conflict was going to escalate in an irreversible direction.

t_ch: 历史的蝴蝶，再次扇动了它的鳞羽。
t_en: The butterfly of history flutters its scaled wings once more.

t_ch: 被学士们占据的伊斯梅尔，博识学会和学士的和谈遥遥无期。前者试图训诫后者，学士因学会而辉煌。后者则竭力向前者证明，学会的辉煌正出于学士。
t_en: Izmael is held by the scholars, and the discussion between them and the Guild goes on without a foreseeable end. The latter is doing all they can to reprimand the former, saying that they only obtain glory because of the Guild. The former contrarily is doing all they can to show that the supposed glory of the Guild is solely derived from the scholars themselves.

t_ch: 自力更生的学者们展开空前绝后的学术交流。第一台万用应急打印机就是其学术成果。
t_en: The self-sufficient scholars embark on unprecedented academic discourse. The first all-purpose emergency printer is one of the fruits of their academic achievements.

t_ch: 你伸了个懒腰，准备迎接新一日的工作。
t_en: You stretch lazily, welcoming a new day's work.

t_ch: 先到粮食制造区看看。
t_en: Take a look at the food production area first.

t_ch: 参与跨学科交流活动。
t_en: Join in the cross-discipline discussion.

t_ch: 和滞留的学派成员交涉。
t_en: Negotiate with stranded members of the other schools.

t_ch: 作为宇宙知识的存储与中转站，伊斯梅尔储存的知识成为学士最大的依仗。利用馆藏资源和各自的研究，你们分工合作，开始在图书馆内生产生活。
t_en: As the repository and transit hub of the universe's knowledge, the knowledge stored in Izmael is the greatest pillar that scholars can rely on. Deploying stashed resources and your own research, you all toil away at your designated tasks, beginning a life within the library itself.

t_ch: 你在人群中找到了帕提维娅，游行开始时，蝴蝶的翅膀攫住她的心神，瞬间产生的朴素的正义冲动，令她走向了抗议队伍的前沿。
t_en: You find Patavia among the crowd. When the protests began, the butterfly's wings captured her heart and mind, stirring a stark righteous urge within her, causing her to walk towards the front of the protesting line.

t_ch: 「那个信号，你有没有想过，从更高的维度俯瞰它的存在？」她与一位研究多维空间的学士谈及了困扰自己的信号，将数据转录进他们的模型。
t_en: "That signal — you ever thought about viewing its existence from a higher dimension?" She discusses the signal that troubles her with a multidimensional research scholar, transferring the data into their model.

t_ch: 于是，你们终于看清信号的本质——<color=#dbc291ff>渗透进虚数背景的涟漪。</color>它从未知的点诞生，又在遥不可及的范围外消失。只要仍在涟漪的范围内，神秘的误差就会进入实验数据当中。
t_en: And so, you all finally ascertain the signal's true nature — <color=#dbc291ff>a rippling wave that permeated into the Imaginary background.</color> It's born from an unknown point and disappears beyond an unfathomable range. As long as it is within the ripple's range, the mysterious error will be captured in the experimental data.

t_ch: 但和通常的「涟漪」不同，无论在哪个位置，波纹数值都完全一致，不存在衰减，不受时空扭曲的影响，就像……
t_en: But it is different from ordinary "ripples." No matter which position it is in, the wave pattern data is completely identical, does not decay, and unaffected by space-time distortion, just like...

t_ch: 一道孤波。
t_en: A solitary wave.

t_ch: 「没错，一道不受任何干涉的孤波，如果能找到它诞生的源头，以它为原点，就能建立一个描述宇宙运动轨迹的模型。」这个模型，将解开未来学大会上的第四道寰宇难题——<color=#dbc291ff>宇宙的未来是确定的，还是混沌的？</color>
t_en: "That's right, a solitary wave undisrupted by anything. If we can find out its source and use it as a point of origin, we can build a model that describes the universe's movement trajectory." This model will answer the fourth Cosmic Conundrum at the Futurological Congress — <color=#dbc291ff>Is the future of the universe predetermined, or is it chaotic?</color>

t_ch: 「看吧，这就是我说的，『运气』。」黑塔若有所思地看向帕提维娅，尽管博识学会的妥协已指日可待，现在的你们，仍是两位滞留于伊斯梅尔的落魄学士。
t_en: "Look. That's what I mean by 'Luck.'" Herta looks thoughtfully at Patavia. Though the Intelligentsia Guild's compromise is imminent, you two are presently still disheveled scholars stranded in Izmael.

t_ch: 在书页状的图书馆前，学士们相互簇拥，齐声高唱。从高处仰望，如同一群蚂蚁，它们将撼动屹立了数百个琥珀纪的河堤。
t_en: In front of the library shaped like pages of a book, scholars are huddled together, singing loudly in unison. Looking from above, they resemble a colony of ants, poised to shake the riverbanks that have stood resolute for hundreds of Amber Eras.

t_ch: 「灵感就是这样，只需要一些波澜，就能浮现。正因如此，也很容易消失…」
t_en: "That's what inspiration is. All it takes is for some ripples to appear. But it is also the reason that it fades away just as easily..."

t_ch: 你满脸过来人的表情。
t_en: You wear the expression of a seasoned veteran.
